game.title: El papalote
game.story_connection: Coco and Mango are flying a kite but the wind keeps changing - keep it steady!

mechanics.core_loop: Keep the kite balanced in the sky as wind changes direction and intensity. Don't let it crash!

controls.tilt_or_drag: Drag left/right to counter the wind
controls.tap_sides: Alternative: tap left or right side to pull string in that direction

wind.intensity: Varies from gentle to strong gusts
wind.visual_indicator: Wind direction arrow or leaves blowing

kite_physics.balance_meter: Center = stable, edges = about to crash
kite_physics.drift_speed: How fast kite moves toward edge based on wind

helpers.effect: Flies by and nudges kite back toward center

visuals.background: Blue sky with clouds, ground visible at bottom
visuals.kite: Colorful diamond kite with tail, tilts based on balance
visuals.string: Line from kite to Coco/Mango at bottom
visuals.wind_indicator: Leaves or arrows showing wind direction
visuals.balance_meter: Horizontal bar with kite position indicator

instructions_text: ¡Mantén el papalote en el aire! Arrastra para equilibrarlo cuando cambie el viento.
implementation_notes: Wind applies constant drift toward one side
Balance meter shows current position visually
Kite SVG tilts based on position (CSS transform rotate)
Birds appear randomly as helper, auto-nudge toward center
Strong gusts give brief warning before hitting
